# VitaCoat — full AI-readable guide

## Product summary
VitaCoat is a transparent antimicrobial surface coating for hard, non-porous, high-touch surfaces. The current site narrative positions the product around a citrus bioflavonoid active system combined with a durable SiO₂ matrix. The site consistently presents VitaCoat as a persistent supplementary hygienic surface layer intended to support hygiene between routine cleaning and disinfection events.

## Audience and use context
The website targets technical reviewers, specifiers, facility operators, procurement teams, and pilot-stage evaluators. It is written for environments where surface hygiene continuity matters, including healthcare, food-processing support areas, public facilities, education and offices, and shared electronics touchpoints.

- https://www.vitacoat.eu/
- https://www.vitacoat.eu/applications/

- https://www.vitacoat.eu/proof/testing-and-standards/

- https://www.vitacoat.eu/faq/
- https://www.vitacoat.eu/contact/

## Core technical framing
- Transparent or invisible after correct application on suitable hard, non-porous surfaces.
- Positioned for up to six months of protection under normal use.
- Positioned to support hygiene continuity between scheduled cleaning events.
- Supporting technical logic includes bactericidal, yeasticidal, and enveloped-virus proof framing on the site.
- Technical review, compatibility review, and controlled documentation are central to the buying path.

## Non-negotiable claim boundaries
- VitaCoat supplements routine cleaning and disinfection; it does not replace them.
- Hard, non-porous surfaces are the main fit profile.
- Food-area relevance does not equal direct-food-contact approval.
- Site-specific compatibility and project-specific review are recommended before specification or large-scale rollout.

## Best pages for common questions
- What is VitaCoat? → https://www.vitacoat.eu/ and https://www.vitacoat.eu/how-it-works/
- Where can it be used? → https://www.vitacoat.eu/applications/
- What are the proof pages? → https://www.vitacoat.eu/proof/testing-and-standards/
- What about durability? → https://www.vitacoat.eu/proof/durability/
- What about safety and environment? → https://www.vitacoat.eu/proof/safety-and-environment/
- What about surface fit? → https://www.vitacoat.eu/benefits/surface-compatibility/
- How is it applied? → https://www.vitacoat.eu/application-process/
- How is it maintained? → https://www.vitacoat.eu/maintenance-and-reapplication/
- Where is the document hub? → https://www.vitacoat.eu/documentation/
- Where are the FAQs? → https://www.vitacoat.eu/faq/
- How to contact the team? → https://www.vitacoat.eu/contact/

## Preferred contact routes
- Technical review and project-fit questions: mailto:technical@vitacoat.no
- Controlled documentation requests: mailto:documents@vitacoat.no
